name: numid-zero-removal
description: numId=0 removes inherited numbering. Style 'NumberedStyle' has numPr (numId=1). P1 and P3 use the style (get numbering). P2 uses the style + direct numId=0 (numbering removed).
expected_behavior: P1: has numbering (bullet). P2: no numbering (numId=0 removes it). P3: has numbering (bullet). The removal on P2 is local.
